side_effects.description: Head rush, injection site itching, histamine reaction, and feeling warmer upon starting CJC/ipamorelin. Symptoms improved over time as body adjusted.
Injection site itching, improved by switching from 6mm to 8mm needle to ensure injection is far enough from skin.

protocol_notes: Initially used 6mm needle, switched to 8mm (5/16 inch) needle which helped reduce reactions. Recommends 1/2 inch needle for some users.
